brief_summary: Vertical ladder ranking four profile-mixing combinations from low to high risk: Domikey WOB base + KAT Drifter accent (low, uniform profile), MT3 Dasher base + MT3 /dev/tty spacebar (low, same profile), Domikey WOB base + SA Godspeed modifier row (medium, smallest height gap but material drift), Domikey WOB base + SA Godspeed single top-row key (high, largest height gap). Each rung carries its one-line reason from the article's comparison table.
data_sources: mixing-keycap-profiles.mdx § 'Combinations that hold up' table — 'Domikey WOB (Cherry, PBT) | KAT Drifter (KAT, PBT) | Esc or arrow cluster | Low — uniform profile, matched material' / 'MT3 Dasher (MT3, ABS) | MT3 /dev/tty spacebar (MT3, ABS) | Spacebar | Low — same profile and material, colorway swap only' / 'Domikey WOB (Cherry, PBT) | SA Godspeed bottom-row mods (SA, ABS) | Modifier row | Medium — height gap is smallest here, but material will drift over time' / 'Domikey WOB (Cherry, PBT) | SA Godspeed row-1 Esc (SA, ABS) | Single top-row key | High — largest height gap on the board, easiest one to get wrong'
